description_long: This stuffed toy is designed to resemble a small, cartoonish canine with exaggerated features. It has a large, cream-colored, spiky mane that frames its face, and oversized, upright ears that are pink on the inside. The toy's body is light brown with a darker blue patch around its neck, mimicking a collar or scarf. Its eyes are wide, oval, and expressive, with a black outline and a white highlight, giving it a lively and endearing appearance. The nose is small and round, and the mouth is a tiny, subtle line beneath the nose. The toy stands on four short legs with rounded paws, and its tail is short and pointed.
description: A plush, cartoon-style dog with a spiky cream mane, large pink ears, and a blue neck patch, standing on four legs with big, expressive eyes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiky cream mane, large oval eyes, small nose, and both upright pink ears clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mane, the shape of the ear, and the blue neck patch, with the tail and legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both ears, the blue neck patch, and the short tail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mane's profile, ear, blue neck patch, and tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-eyed and alert, with a small, neutral mouth and no visible eyebrows, giving it a curious and friendly look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head facing forward and ears perked up.
